title: Resolution Commending the Municipal Health Office, Headed by Dr. Alvin A. Isidoro, for Achieving 65.47% of Target Covid-19 Vaccination Coverage, Thereby Making the Municipality of Los Baños Ranked First Among 30 Cities and Municipalities in the Province of Laguna in the Immunization Status of the 70% Target Population for Covid-19 Vaccination. (AUTHOR (S): Councilor (s)miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Rodora P. Loares, Jozylyn N. Manansala, 11/
